steps.title: Translate '8 times a number x'
steps.content: The phrase '8 times a number x' means multiply 8 by $x$, which is written as $$8x$$.

steps.title: Add 3 more
steps.content: '3 more than' means we add 3 to the previous result, giving $$8x+3$$.

steps.title: Set equal to 83 and identify the choice
steps.content:
The full statement 'is equal to 83' gives the equation $$8x+3=83$$. Looking at the options, this matches choice D.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
